privileged_info_summary: The source scene is dwanko_run.tnz from the official OpenToonz samples. The task requires rendering a subset of the animation (frames 5 through 15) to a specific directory (/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/dailies) as a PNG sequence. The original scene resolution is 1920x1080, and the required output is scaled to 50% (960x540). All task parameters have been empirically verified against the scripts and original scene files.
